notable_quotes: We can basically turn the game into Honor Mode minus the one-save one-life rule.
All right, we couldn't get up there.
But we could still get XP from combat just by sitting back in safety and watching as allies fell one by one.
Wyll? Wyll? I'm not gonna sugarcoat it, this sucks. Our companion collection being incomplete because our level 1 wizard is now useless... Wyll didn't make it back to camp.
Our familiars were incredibly weak. Really they were useful just for applying status effects... and they weren't even remotely threatening.
priority_actions: Fix Wyll's camp spawning logic to prevent NPC disappearance after the Grove gate battle.
Adjust the damage and physics impact of the 'Unstable Statue' in the Shattered Sanctum to ensure it meaningfully damages targets.
Add a race-specific jump distance warning to the trajectory UI to reduce 'Too High' error spam for small-stature races.
Optimize Mage Hand initiative rolls or animation speed to prevent clunky transitions during stealth-to-combat ambushes.
Review the 'outside of combat' summoning restriction to reduce the 'short rest loop' tedium described by players at 11:02.
top_highlight: Wyll? Wyll? I'm not gonna sugarcoat it, this sucks. Our companion collection being incomplete because our level 1 wizard is now useless... Wyll didn't make it back to camp.
